{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323022032536639C399938C56F8D7\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382421777551704856","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还没看完，写得不错。特别是偷电池那一段，最恨这些偷电池的了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718856576,"group_id":"7354334982183078936","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"番茄原创作家，大神。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8jjQwSnMptbkC4U5WboYy8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4bdffb1c0a8e44e49133e373fb5e86d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788612\u0026x-signature=ATmSMUoMs%2F2jNuAf9yQO4Vp%2B44E%3D","user_id":"100174619592","user_name":"胡八零"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100174619592","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7354334982183078936","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市日常+外卖文+无系统+无灵异+无玄幻】\n林峰落魄，穷途末路之际，被外卖女骑手收留在家，跟着外卖女骑手一起送外卖，遇到一些外卖骑手的故事。\n本书写这些外卖骑手的日常生活。他们是社会上地位比较低的一群人，他们有爱也有恨，他们也有志向，有理想。他们对美好生活有着不屈不挠的追求。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8e9ae49b07d4421af05fac9d8302b
